summary: Comprehensive testing completed for I CAN SCHOOL Health & Safety Training & Certification Portal. All backend APIs functional (100% pass rate), frontend fully operational with proper authentication flows, module reading system, admin analytics dashboard, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Backend API: All 19 tests passed (100% success rate)
Admin login with admin@icanschool.com works correctly
Staff login with julia@icanschool.com works correctly
Admin dashboard loads with analytics stats and charts
Admin path builder accessible and functional
Admin staff directory shows user list
Staff dashboard displays 6 training modules with progress tracking
Module reader loads content with proper navigation and section tracking
Resources vault displays emergency contacts and forms correctly
All API endpoints return expected data (modules, analytics, resources, etc.)
Role-based access control functioning (admin vs staff views)
Material Design 3 theme properly implemented with green color scheme
